creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 6/5/12 7:10 AM, Denis wrote:
> my patch for PHP 5.4 = pecl extension sqlite2 (1.0.3) support php 5.4
>
> http://pecl.php.net/get/SQLite-1.0.3.tgz
>
please update your ports tree.  databases/php5-sqlite does not exist 
anymore.
There is nothing to patch against.

Maybe you might want to create a new port? pecl-sqlite?
If  you need assistance, read the porters handbook 
<http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/> (also important, 
no base64 attachments, look at the pr link below, you can't read the 
patch, can you?

If you still need assistance after reading the porters handbook, then 
ask questions in ports@.


> 2012/6/5 <scheidell@freebsd.org <mailto:scheidell@freebsd.org>>
>
>     Synopsis: Patch done databases/php5-sqlite (PHP 5.4)
>
>     State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
>     State-Changed-By: scheidell
>     State-Changed-When: Tue Jun 5 11:04:48 UTC 2012
>     State-Changed-Why:
>     From /usr/ports/MOVED: databases/php5-sqlite||2012-05-16|Removed from
>     core php
>
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=168157
>
>
